description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 16, 2024 at 5:27 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a van in an underground parking lot at 1160 Mission Street. 
 
Two Waymo AVs were stopped at neighboring junctures of a tight T-instersection of the lot. The first Waymo AV was preparing to make a 
right turn, while yielding to the other Waymo AV. While the Waymo AVs remained stopped, a van that had been traveling behind the first 
Waymo AV entered the oncoming lane to maneuver around the left side of the Waymo AV. The passenger side of the van then made 
contact with the rear driver side of the stopped Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
